column1: # Legacy redirect map — CO-01 drop-in point for the apex domain cutover.
# This file lists every significant URL from the PRIOR invest.com.au host
# (inbound links / GSC search traffic) and the path it must 301/308 to on the
# new site. The real list is founder-supplied (CO-01 in the remediation queue
# see docs/runbooks/cutover.md "Generate the 301 redirect map") and is BLOCKED
# until that list arrives — drop the rows in below and the harness picks them
# up with zero code changes. Each entry also needs a matching rule in
# next.config.ts redirects().
# Verified by: npm run cutover:redirects -- --target=https://<host>
#   (asserts 301/308 + Location path match; absolute Locations tolerated on
#    the target host; trailing-slash insensitive; "#" lines are ignored)
# Format: no quoting; the first two commas delimit columns
# column may contain commas. Destinations may be paths or absolute URLs.
# The three rows below are EXAMPLES wired to existing internal redirects so
# the harness can be exercised end-to-end today. Replace/extend them with the
# real prior-host list when CO-01 unblocks.
source_path
/brokers
/quiz
/super-funds
